Title: Buta no Liver wa Kanetsu Shiro

Creators: Takuma Sakai
Actors: Yoshitsugu Matsuoka / Tomori Kusunoki / Kent Itou

Introduction
    An unappealing otaku awakens in the body of a pig after he passes out while eating raw pig liver. The pig finds himself in the company of Jess, an innocent girl who can read people's minds, and she accepts him.

Also known as: Butareba: The Story of a Man Who Turned Into a Pig
